{{Quote|Yansan's activities have become a serious detriment to our operations.|[[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Bakki Sourthol]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Yansan''' was a [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] saboteur. An ecology student on his native [[Moltok/Legends|Moltok]], Yansan always despised technology to a fanatic extent—even for a Ho'Din. He concluded that the evils of technology were too big and that he should "free" the galaxy from technology.<ref name="AIR" />

Yansan enlisted in [[Traval-Parcor System Institute of Technology]], to learn all he could about the hated subject, and obtained his degree on [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]. He then became a saboteur, constantly attacking starships specially in [[Hijoian Space/Legends|Hijoian Space]], an area with intense Rebel activity. One in each three starships he attacked was owned or operated by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and he caused the death of three civilians.<ref name="AIR" />

Around [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] or [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Yansan destroyed a Rebel ship on [[Ichalin Station]], with four Rebel agents inside it. All of them died when escape proved to be impossible.<ref name="AIR" />

On 2 ABY, Yansan caused two Rebel [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transports]] to collide on [[Hijoian Docks]]. Nobody was injured, but the Alliance would take some time to recover from the loss.<ref name="AIR" />

Rebel pilot [[Bakki Sourthol]] was assigned to write an intelligence report about Yansan. Sourthol had met Yansan on [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]] when the Ho'Din tried to destroy the transport Sourthol was in. Thanks to that encounter, Sourthol noticed that Yansan had a limp, preferring the left leg, and reported it as an identification feature.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' {{1stm}}
